name: Lamar, Archer & Cofrin, LLP v. Appling
question: Can a statement regarding a specific asset be a “statement respecting the debtor’s . . . financial condition” under section 523(a)(2)(B) of the Bankruptcy Code, and if so, when?
description: A case in which the Court decided that a statement regarding a specific asset can be a “statement respecting the debtor’s . . . financial condition” under section 523(a)(2)(B) of the Bankruptcy Code.
